channel.title: GNtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to avoid excise tax offset fees on points transfers from American Express
item.description: Tips for avoiding excise taxes when transferring AmEx points to airlines.

item.title: You can use Hilton Honors points to book this new wine resort in Napa
item.description: Book a relaxing retreat with points at Napa, California's newest wine resort.

item.title: The history of classic airline meals in 7 courses
item.description: A seven-course dinner at PDX traces aviation history through airline meals.

item.title: Evaluating the Atmos Ascent card bonus: 80,000 points and more
item.description: Analyzing the value of the card's points bonus, flight discount, and companion fare.
